content:
# Session 311 (iter-311) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- Lanes: **2** prover, both Route A ‚Äî `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean` (FBC dictionary cocycle),
  `Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse.lean` (DUAL round-trips). D3‚Ä≤ (TOS) **HELD** (iter-310
  reversal fired: D3‚Ä≤ LSP-stuck ‚Üí flip to DUAL; structural refactor pivot deferred to iter-312).
- Build: GREEN. `sync_leanok` ran a real `lake build` for iter-311 (sha `403ffe89`, 1017s, 0 marker
  changes) ‚áí both edited modules compile. In-lane `lake build` of FBC hit the recurring 3.2M-hb
  timeout (exit 137) ‚Äî NOT a real failure (the sync build of the same module succeeded).
- Global sorry ~68 (FBC 2‚Üí3, DUAL 5‚Üí4; net 0).

## DUAL lane ‚Äî `sliceDualTransport.left_inv` SOLVED (axiom-clean), 5‚Üí4
Closed the round-trip two prior iters avoided. Verified recipe (extends `analogies/dualcoerce309.md`):
1. `erw [Scheme.Modules.ŒµInv_apply √ó3]` fires the 3 nested `inv Œµ`; then
   `all_goals try exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso _` discharges the `Function.Bijective`
   side-goals **first** ‚Äî otherwise the `?hg` metavars block the `rw` motive.
2. `simp only [Over.mk_left]` pins both `appIso` swaps to the same `P = f‚Åª¬π·µÅ(unop W'').left`.
3. **`erw [appIso_swap_cancel f P (bij) (bij)]`** (new helper) cancels the adjacent
   `(appIso P).hom‚Åª¬π‚àò(appIso P).inv‚Åª¬π`. MUST be **focused** (explicit `f,P,bij,bij`) ‚Äî bare
   `erw [appIso_swap_cancel]` whnf-times-out at 800k hb; plain `rw` fails on the `ùüô_`-carrier type.
4. **`erw [presheafMap_ofBijective_symm]`** (new helper) turns `Œµrel‚Åª¬π` into the plain reverse
   relabel `X.presheaf.map (eqToHom e.symm)`.
5. Residual = `œÜ.naturality`: `convert (PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply œÜ g y‚ÇÄ).symm using 2`
   (`using 2` is exact; `3/4` overshoots). The leftover relabel composite
   `(restr fV M.val).map g ‚àò M.val.map (eqToHom)` = `ùüô` because `restr = pushforward‚ÇÄ(Over.forget U)`
   (so `restr.map g = M.val.map(...).op` by `rfl`), then `erw [‚Üê map_comp_apply]` +
   `Subsingleton.elim ‚Ä¶ (ùüô ‚Ä¶)` + `ModuleCat.restrictScalarsId'App_inv_apply`.

Key dead-end: `rw [RingEquiv.symm_apply_eq]` fails even with no metavars (`Mul`-instance synth on the
`ùüô_/restr`-spelled unit carrier) ‚áí do all ring-equiv algebra inside **plain-carrier helper lemmas**
fired by `erw` (defeq-bridges the spelling), never `rw`/`simp` directly on the goal.

2 new helpers landed (both axiom-clean, structurally sound per lean-auditor): `appIso_swap_cancel`,
`presheafMap_ofBijective_symm`.

### `sliceDualTransport.right_inv` (PARTIAL, L843)
Same opener (`ŒµInv_apply √ó3` + bijectivity-first) reduces it; residual documented. **Differs from
`left_inv`:** the two `appIso` swaps are NOT adjacent here (`Œµ_inv = (appIso fW').inv` separated by
`Œµrel`), so `appIso_swap_cancel` does not directly fire ‚Äî needs a 3-way `appIso_relabel_cancel`
absorbing `Œµrel` between the swaps. Then closes as `left_inv`.

## FBC lane ‚Äî `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso_comp` PARTIAL (frontier materialized + reduced), 2‚Üí3
The iter-310-named frontier lemma now EXISTS as a decl (L1266) and is reduced to one residual:
- Statement compiles green: the source cocycle is spelled
  `eqToIso (Spec.map_comp) ‚â™‚â´ (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (Spec.map j) (Spec.map œÜ)).symm`, the
  target cocycle `ModuleCat.extendScalarsComp œÜ.hom j.hom`, under
  `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` + `maxHeartbeats 3200000` (the
  banked shared key ‚Äî `pullback` is an opaque `Lan` left adjoint).
- Proof: `rw [pullbackSpecTildeNatIso, gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp]; congr 1; rw [Equiv.symm_apply_eq]`
  cleanly transports the **landed** Œì-side cocycle (`gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp`, iter-310) in, and
  strips the outer `.symm`, leaving a **conjugateIsoEquiv image equation** (pushforward-side cocycle
  = conjugate-transported pullback-side cocycle) ‚Äî exactly the "one `conjugateEquiv_comp` step"
  predicted. Left as bare `sorry` (L1283).

**This is the convergence again:** the FBC residual is the SAME conjugate-fusion shape as the D3‚Ä≤
`key` (TOS:2631). FBC's, however, is NOT LSP-blocked ‚Äî the tactic prefix compiles fast; it just needs
the `conjugateIsoEquiv` functoriality step applied, which the lane ran out of build budget to finish.

Untouched (deprioritized): FBC canonical-mate sorries L961/L983; downstream assembly
`pushforwardPullbackBaseChange_restrict_naturality` (blocked on the cocycle).

## Review subagents
- **lean-auditor `iter311`** (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter311.md`): 1 must-fix / 6 major / 8 minor.
  Must-fix = FBC L1283 bare `sorry` with **no local comment** naming the remaining goal (load-bearing
  move-2 datum). Major = all 6 are documented known sorries. New decls axiom-clean; `left_inv` close
  correct. Minor = stale `STATUS (iter-NNN)` comment blocks in both files; DUAL header sorry-count
  drift.
- **lvb `dual311`** (`...-dual311.md`): FAITHFUL ‚Äî `left_inv` genuinely closed, 2 helpers axiom-clean
  & correctly named, 4 sorries honest, blueprint amply detailed. 2 minor: helper lemmas "unpinned".
- **lvb `fbc311`** (`...-fbc311.md`): FAITHFUL ‚Äî no signature/name drift on
  `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso_comp` (matches `\lean{...}` + blueprint L1143), all 3 sorries honest,
  blueprint only minorly thin on the cocycle's Lean residual mechanics. 0 red flags.

## Blueprint-doctor
Broken `\cref`/`\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (2) + `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13) ‚Äî pre-existing,
off the active front, 0 `\uses` damage on the FBC/TOS gate chapters. No orphan chapters, no new axioms.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
None. `sync_leanok` (iter-311, 0 changes) is correct: every newly-landed decl is part of a
still-sorry-bearing parent (`sliceDualTransport`, `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso_comp`), so no `\leanok`
is due. DAG `unmatched` = 0 (no coverage debt). No `\lean{}` rename, no `\mathlibok`, no stale
`\notready` on the touched chapters.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Plain-carrier helper + focused `erw`** is the recipe for the `ùüô_`/`restr`-spelled unit carriers:
  isolate the ring-equiv algebra in a helper stated over plain carriers, fire with focused `erw`.
- **Discharge bijectivity metavars BEFORE `rw`** on `RingEquiv.ofBijective.symm` chains.
- The 02KH dictionary cocycle (FBC) and the D3‚Ä≤ `key` are now the SAME residual shape; a shared
  `conjugateIsoEquiv`-fusion fix should serve both.

See `recommendations.md` for next-iter actions.
